description: Use this API to get generator logical extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr, lval = get_ext_generator_logical(ibus, machid, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension generator field desired. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘LVAL’ not returned.
Unknown error with data access; ‘LVAL’ not returned.
API Prereqs not met; ‘LVAL’ not returned.
